story.title: Show HN: Orbit – AR satellite tracker, watch 15k+ objects
story.summary:
Hey HN! I made Orbit, an iOS app that allows you to see the satellites, planets, and constellations above you in AR, on a 2D map, and on a 3D globe.
The app includes more than 15,000 objects tracked by CelesTrack, together with their pass predictions, descriptions, and detailed orbital data.
A searchable catalog of all objects is also available, as well as a built-in chatbot designed to answer any space-related questions you might have. This is my first published iOS app, so any feedback is greatly appreciated!
App Store:  https://apps.apple.com/app/id6772174570 
 
 Comments URL:  https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48873501 
 Points: 72 
 # Comments: 19
